summary: Iteration 8: Tested 3 new UI features (Cancellation Banner dismiss, Month Calendar, Chat Lightbox) plus regression. All 3 features work correctly. Note: the test in review_request referenced /studio/ (singular) but correct route is /studios/ (plural) - not a bug, just a test URL issue.

success_rate.backend: 75% (3/4 tests - 1 skipped due to slot lookup logic, fixed manually via curl)

seed_data_creation: Created slot slot_3a0a4ad139b9 (2026-04-21), booking book_f78ef5a26e9b, cancelled as studio (cancelled_by=studio). Sent image message msg_5e691e67da17 with image_url=https://picsum.photos/400/300.
test_credentials: Customer: test_customer@inkbook.com / Test1234!, Studio: test_studio@inkbook.com / Test1234!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 fully verified: 1) Cancellation Banner X button (dismiss-cancellation-btn) works - banner visible when cancelled_by=studio booking exists, click dismisses it. 2) Month Calendar in /studios/studio_d052af828f1f: 7-column Mo-So grid, today highlighted with ring-2, past days disabled, prev/next month nav (cal-prev-month/cal-next-month) works, future day click works. 3) Chat Lightbox: cursor-zoom-in on image, click opens [data-testid=chat-lightbox], X button (chat-lightbox-close) closes, click outside also closes. All regression flows working. IMPORTANT: The correct route for StudioPage is /studios/:studioId (plural), not /studio/. The review_request had wrong URL /studio/studio_d052af828f1f.

feature_test_results.cancellation_banner_dismiss: PASS - Banner shows for cancelled_by=studio bookings, X button dismisses it with AnimatePresence exit animation
feature_test_results.month_calendar: PASS - Full 7-col grid, today ring-2 highlight, past days disabled, prev/next month navigation works
feature_test_results.chat_lightbox: PASS - Image opens lightbox overlay, close button works, click outside closes
